title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF EMERALD VALLEY BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 1545 W 22nd Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Email (541) 345-9939 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 345-9939 Main phone Main phone (541) 345-9939 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: One-year membership is $40 per member. Fees for other programs may vary. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Eugene SITE HOURS: Summer Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm School Hours: Monday-Friday 2:30pm-6:30pm Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Mentoring Programs Tutoring Services Youth Employment Programs Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
